clarified_problem_statement: The existing pilot blind-box content correction introduced conditional and blocked pools, but those pools contain too many small attachments and non-object visual phenomena. The specification must require every item-pool entry to be a concrete object or object group, and move non-object forbidden expressions into validation-only patterns.

confirmed_target_users.name: 内容维护者
needs: 清楚知道每个池层只能写具体物品
有可测试的 forbidden_patterns 防止误写非物品
pain_points: 风险池容易被当成不可用词垃圾桶
条件池容易写成小标签和附属关系

confirmed_target_users.name: 工具使用者
needs: 抽取结果和备选内容都能对应真实可见物品
不再看到折线、擦痕、阴影、气泡等不可用内容
pain_points: 非物品内容不能用于游戏差异点
过小的条件项无法形成有效画面内容

confirmed_domain: Game content extraction static blind-box item library quality patch

confirmed_features.name: conditional_items 物品化
confirmed_features.description: 三类试点的 conditional_items 必须替换为中等以上体量、可单独圈选、只因场景前提才启用的完整具体物品。
acceptance_criteria: 不包含标签、卡片、扣件、贴片、边缘小附属物
每个条目都是独立物品或物品组
edge_cases: 带有场景关系的条目可以保留，但关系不能掩盖物品本体太小的问题

confirmed_features.name: blocked_or_risky 具体风险物约束
confirmed_features.description: blocked_or_risky 只保留具体但默认禁用的风险物品，不再存放视觉现象或痕迹。
acceptance_criteria: 不包含折线、擦痕、气泡、阴影、边线、碎叶点、微小污点等非物品
保留透明、反光、发光、动物本体、细绳流苏等具体风险物
edge_cases: 动物本体是具体对象，但仍属于 blocked_or_risky，而不是 forbidden_patterns

confirmed_features.name: forbidden_patterns 校验
confirmed_features.description: 新增验证清单，禁止非物品模式进入任何五层物品池。
edge_cases: 关键词如 边缘 可能误伤部分合法物品，需要在实现时谨慎选择或细化规则

confirmed_features.name: 文档同步
confirmed_features.description: 同步项目文档，明确五层池都必须是具体物品，非物品内容只作为禁用模式或测试规则。
acceptance_criteria: 更新 agents.md、README.md、Game content extraction/CLAUDE.md、Game content extraction/README.md
.gitignore 保持 workflow 输出可跟踪策略

non_functional_requirements.details: Validation must prevent recurrence of non-object pool entries.
non_functional_requirements.measurable_criteria: Unit tests fail when forbidden patterns appear in any pilot item pool.

non_functional_requirements.details: The correction must keep pilot box IDs and legacy runtime buckets stable.

out_of_scope: Field renaming from blocked_or_risky to blocked_objects
constraints: All five pools contain concrete objects only.
Non-object forbidden expressions are validation data, not item pool entries.

key_assumptions: The current field names can remain for this patch if their semantics are clarified.
The user wants a concrete object library, not a list of visual difference phenomena.

discussion_log.agent_prompt: Brainstorm and clarify failures in conditional_items and blocked_or_risky.
discussion_log.user_response: conditional_items 太小，blocked_or_risky 生成非物品现象；需要具体物品。
